channel.title: Systems and Infrasctruture :: CS Two Year Refactor
channel.description: Systems and Infrastructure Analyze System Behavior I can investigate the behavior of computing systems by examining interactions among software, hardware, networks, and data. I explain system performance, reliability, and resource utilization using evidence gathered from observation and measurement. Manage Computing Environments I can configure and operate computing environments that support software development, deployment, and maintenance. I establish and manage the tools, services, dependencies, and resources needed for effective system operation.
